channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  4. Microsoft says Windows 11 is getting a Windows 10-like compact taskbar, not just a movable taskbar  Windows Latest
  5. Windows 11 to become “calmer and more chill” OS with “fewer upsells”  OC3D

item.title: Gigabyte shows Z890 AORUS TACHYON DUO X ICE with CQDIMM DDR5-10400 XMP demo - VideoCardz.com
item.description:
1. Gigabyte shows Z890 AORUS TACHYON DUO X ICE with CQDIMM DDR5-10400 XMP demo  VideoCardz.com
  2. ASUS Unveils Complete Portfolio Support for Intel Core 200S Series  ASUS Pressroom
  3. COLORFUL Launches iGame Z890 ULTRA-S W and Z890M ULTRA Z Motherboards  Tech4Gamers
  4. Gigabyte Aorus Mainboards: High-Performance Backbone for Gaming and AI Workloads in 2026  AD HOC NEWS
  5. Gigabyte launches Z890 Plus motherboards for Core Ultra  Engineering.com
